channel.title: Architecture on 🖋 Yeray Cabello 🏴‍☠️
channel.description: Recent content in Architecture on 🖋 Yeray Cabello 🏴‍☠️

item.title: Contract negotiation and versioning
item.description: Changing the input or output of an API endpoint that is consumed by your front end, changing a field in a database that is coupled to a field in a model in our application. Sometimes, you see yourself making changes in two different systems and it’s really tempting to coordinate the release of both systems to keep them in sync.
